channel.title: Sidebar on Shadocs theme documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Sidebar on Shadocs theme documentation

item.title: Simple page
item.description: Description# A content page is defined as follows: *.md page located in a folder containing at least one section definition page (_index.md) Section _index.md simple_page.md

item.title: Single page with icon
item.description: Description# A content section or page can be identified using an icon from the FontAwesome library in order to ease navigation. Two possible parametrization (with the several FontAwesome classes for each parameter value): standard parametrization using the default theme configuration per-page parametrization using the titleIcon variable in front matter Standard parametrization# themeParams.toml Per-page parametrization# example of the current page: page.md--- titleIcon: "fa-solid fa-icons" ---
